question: From Q4 2023 to Q1 2024, how did Park C’s visitor numbers change relative to Park A’s visitor numbers?

options.A: Park C’s visitors increased by a similar amount as Park A’s visitors
options.B: Park C’s visitors increased much more than Park A’s visitors
options.C: Park C’s visitors decreased while Park A’s visitors increased slightly
options.D: Park C’s visitors stayed about the same while Park A’s visitors increased sharply

explanation: The y-axis starts at 18 instead of 0, which visually exaggerates smaller components in a stacked area chart. In Q1 2024, C is about 50% of A (data: 44.3 vs 109.1), but the truncated baseline can make it appear closer to 80%.
